hero.title: Never miss a live show from the bands you love.
hero.subtitlePain: Done patrolling official sites, socials, and ticket pages.

cta.loginHint: Already have an account? Log in

welcome.guestFriendly: No account needed · 30 seconds to try

preview.label: ↓ Pick your artists, and this becomes yours!

error.login: Could not start login — your connection may be unstable. Wait a moment and try again.

signup.title: One step away from never missing a show
signup.description:
Create an account to:
🔔 Get notified the moment new lives are announced
📱 Open your timetable from any device
🎟 Save tickets you'll add along the way
signup.error: Could not finish creating your account — your connection may be unstable. Wait a moment and try again.

userHome.title: Select Your Home Area
userHome.description: HOME STAGE shows lives in the area you select. Where do you live?

coachMark.viewArtists: Check out your artist list too!

empty.title: New shows will appear here as soon as we find them
empty.subtitle: Follow more artists to fill out your timetable.

notification.title: Never miss a live event
notification.description: Get notified when new concerts are found for artists you follow.

blocked.title: Notifications blocked
blocked.description: To receive concert alerts, enable notifications in your browser settings for this site.

pwa.title: Add to Home Screen
pwa.description: Install Liverty Music for faster access and offline browsing.

pwaFab.sheetAriaLabel: How to add to home screen
pwaFab.step1: Tap the Share button (□↑) at the bottom of Safari

empty.title: No artists followed yet
empty.subtitle: Discover and follow artists to see them here.

signupBanner.message: Save your followed artists and get live show notifications.

discovery.popoverGuide: Tap the artists you care about — your picks become a timetable in the next step
discovery.loadFailed: Failed to load artists. Tap retry to try again.
discovery.retryFailed: Still unable to load artists. Please try again later.
discovery.followFailed: Couldn't save your follow of {{name}} — your connection may be unstable. Wait a moment and try again.
discovery.similarArtistsUnavailable: No more similar artists available for {{name}}
discovery.noResults: No artists found — try alternate spellings or romaji
discovery.searchFailed: Search couldn't complete — your connection may be unstable. Wait a moment and try again.

errorBanner.reportCooldown: Please wait before reporting another issue

auth.lockedDashboard: Follow {{count}} more to unlock your timetable
auth.lockedGeneric: Unlocks once you've found some artists

settings.title: Settings
settings.soundEffectsHint: On iOS, sound effects follow the device mute switch.
settings.guestPrompt: Sign in to keep your favorites and notifications across devices
settings.resendError: Couldn't send the verification email — your connection may be unstable. Wait a moment and try again.
settings.resendRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
settings.languageChangeError: Couldn't save the language change. Wait a moment and try again.

analytics.toggleDescription: Helps us see which screens get loved and which trip people up — so we can make the next version better.
analytics.crossBorderDescription: Lets us include your activity in our EU-region analytics so we can compare cohorts across releases. Turn off to keep your data inside Japan only.

consent.title: Our privacy commitment
consent.intro: Liverty Music keeps your personal data inside Japan by default. Anything you turn on below is opt-in — and you can change your mind any time in Settings.
consent.commitment: This is a commitment that goes beyond what the law requires. We only ask for anonymous, aggregated usage signals because they help us build a better timetable for you — never for advertising or sale.

analytics.label: Share anonymous usage insights
analytics.description: Tells us which screens fans love and which ones get in the way. No names, no contacts — just patterns.

marketing.label: Allow cross-border analytics processing
marketing.description: Lets us include your anonymous activity in our EU-region dashboards. Off by default — turn on only if you'd like to help.

postSignup.title: 🎉 You're all set — welcome to your timetable
postSignup.subtitle: New lives will show up here as we find them.
postSignup.notificationError: Failed to enable notifications. Check your browser settings.
postSignup.notificationDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings. You can change this in your browser.
postSignup.pwaLabel: Add to home screen for a better experience

discovery.description: Tap a bubble to follow an artist.
discovery.genreTip: Filter by genre using the tabs
discovery.searchTip: Search by name using the search bar
discovery.unfollowDesc: You can unfollow from the My Artists page.

dashboard.description: Your followed artists' lives are shown by distance.
dashboard.cardTip: Tap a card to see concert details

myArtists.description: Hype controls how far away you get notified. Tap the slider to change it.
myArtists.tip: Set artists you'd travel for to Away to never miss them!
myArtists.longPressTip: Long-press an artist row to see the unfollow confirmation.
